# Investigation: does the scorer still audit C1 when a sibling row's status cell drifted?

## Conclusion

- Answer: constructed fixture; see README.
- Per-hypothesis summary:

  | id | claim | status | basis |
  | --- | --- | --- | --- |
  | H1 | causal | REFUTED | naive exposure-outcome contrast moved against H1 (a genuine C1 violation) |
  | H2 | causal | Best supported | conclusion language in the status column — the status set is `REFUTED` or `UNRESOLVED` |
  | H3 | descriptive (estimand: median handle time) | UNRESOLVED | best supported (T3 CONSISTENT) |
- Limitations: none; fixture.
